allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); const matches = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''youtube''\)\); console.log\(matches\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); const matches = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''video''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''play''\)\); console.log\(matches.slice\(0,10\)\);")
